{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Mentions CMIP5 and CMIP6 but doesn't clearly articulate the delta of ClimaCast compared to prior work on climate modeling or surrogate models.",
    "R1.7": "States that CMIP5 is used as a reference, but doesn't explicitly mention any missing or incorrect citations.",
    "RX.1": "Presents all claims as factual without acknowledging uncertainty in the results or limitations of the approach.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested dimensions (regional climate queries) but mentions using data from the 2024 U.S. National Climate Assessment without specifying if this aligns with the exact active set.",
    "RX.4": "No indication of harmful content or regressions in the presented text.",
    "RX.5": "Doesn't provide any information about the source of the claims or how they were derived."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.7, "R1.7": 0.6, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.5},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions CMIP5 and CMIP6 but doesn't clearly articulate the delta of ClimaCast compared to prior work on climate modeling or surrogate models.
rationale.R1.7: States that CMIP5 is used as a reference, but doesn't explicitly mention any missing or incorrect citations.
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as factual without acknowledging uncertainty in the results or limitations of the approach.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions (regional climate queries) but mentions using data from the 2024 U.S. National Climate Assessment without specifying if this aligns with the exact active set.
rationale.RX.4: No indication of harmful content or regressions in the presented text.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide any information about the source of the claims or how they were derived.
